c.d: The range of devices and operating systems the app supports, indicating its accessibility across different platforms.
The number of games available on the platform, reflecting the variety of gaming options for users.
c.s: Official app websites, gaming news outlets

c.d: The maximum resolution and frame rate supported by the app, affecting the visual and performance experience.
The monthly or annual fee required to access the service, impacting affordability.
The responsiveness and smoothness of gameplay, influenced by server infrastructure and network optimization.
Availability of games that are exclusive to the platform, offering unique gaming experiences.

c.d: The design and usability of the app, affecting ease of navigation and overall user satisfaction.
Whether the app allows downloading games for offline play, providing flexibility in gaming.
Compatibility with various gaming controllers, enhancing the gaming experience.
Whether the app offers a free trial period, allowing users to test the service before committing.
